channel.title: Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Blog.elmah.io on .NET Ramblings

item.title: How to upload files in an ASP.NET Core Web API
item.description: Files are an integrated part of an application. From a social app to an ERP, some form of media exists in the ecosystem. .NET Core APIs provide built-in support for uploading and fetching documents. In today's post, I will show you how to cleanly and efficiently use .NET Link to article: https://blog.elmah.io/how-to-upload-files-in-an-asp-net-core-web-api/
